This is a Jekyll-based website for Hawaii State Services. It uses the Minima theme and is deployed to GitHub Pages.

When fixing accessibility issues:
- Follow WCAG 2.1 AA guidelines
- Preserve the existing visual design as much as possible
- Add appropriate alt text that describes the purpose of images
- Ensure all form inputs have associated labels
- Fix color contrast to meet the 4.5:1 ratio for normal text and 3:1 for large text
- Ensure all interactive elements are keyboard accessible
- Use semantic HTML elements appropriately
- Ensure proper heading hierarchy (don't skip levels)
- Add proper table headers with scope attributes
- Ensure all links have discernible text
- Remove or replace non-accessible patterns like marquee elements
